nasb.text: Then He said to me, “See, I will give you cow’s dung in place of human dung over which you will prepare your bread.”

esv.text: Then he said to me, “See, I assign to you cow’s dung instead of human dung, on which you may prepare your bread.”

cnv.text: 於是他對我說：“你看，我准你用牛糞代替人糞，你可以在牛糞上烤你的餅。”

ccb.text: 于是祂对我说：“好吧，我容许你用牛粪代替人粪来烤饼。”
